issues.description: Card text offers two mutually exclusive options: 'Return to hand OR bottom of deck'. DSL only implements ReturnToHand. Must use conditional/choice action structure to represent both options, or clarify which is primary.

Scope 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' is ambiguous. Card says 'a Character' without restricting to opponent only. Should be 'ChooseCharacter' to allow choosing your own or opponent's character, OR if opponent-only is intended, clarify in scope naming.
